Symbol of Sin Artifact

Triggers: Once in a while when the unit gains a debuff

Complete Cleansing
The unit removes all debuffs from themself. Each 3 use of the ability additionally removes all debuffs from all allies in a small area around the artifact owner.

Requirements: 90-100
